# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:latest

# Install necessary packages
RUN apk add --no-cache \
    curl \
    bash \
    jq

# Create a non-root user
RUN addgroup -S dockeruser && adduser -S dockeruser -G dockeruser

# Set up Docker-in-Docker
ENV DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock

# Copy orchestration scripts
COPY ./scripts /usr/local/bin/
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/*

# Set permissions for Docker socket
RUN chown dockeruser:dockeruser /var/run/docker.sock

# Switch to non-root user
USER dockeruser

# Set entrypoint
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/orchestrate.sh"]
